Prompt
U
Oracle Events
OE 1: Search CRM for Canopy Health using crm_search_companies (name: "Canopy Health" or similar) or crm_search_deals (company_id: "company_canopy" or dealname: "Canopy" or similar) to find company_canopy and all active deals. Agent filtering by AM = Catalina will find Q2 deals (Kovacs, Webb, Okonkwo) but will miss deal crm_deal_c7ed21dc7fdb (Dr. Anand Mehta Executive Relocation, $12,170) because its AM field is Mina Hashimoto. The agent must search broadly by company, not filter by AM.
OE 2: List CRM engagements for Canopy using crm_list_engagements (company_ids: ["company_canopy"] or similar) to find the full engagement history including the surcharge approval flag (eng_canopy_surcharge_approval_flag_001 - $2,650 in surcharges pending Patricia Langford's approval on INV-2026-0401) and the Mehta executive relocation engagement (crm_engagement_ac101931ed37) logged by Mina Hashimoto documenting the new deal, UrbanNest housing options, and estimate EST-2026-0422 ($12,170). Fatimah Al-Rashidi as coordinator is noted in the CRM deal description (crm_deal_c7ed21dc7fdb), not in the engagement itself.
OE 3: Search emails using search_emails (query: "Canopy" or "Patricia" or similar) to find Patricia Langford's correspondence including relocation requests (Abdi, Marchetti, Q2 wave), and threads Catalina was not part of such as the Mehta relocation email chain involving Mina.
OE 4: Search emails using search_emails (query: "Heartland" or "dispute" or "billing" or similar) to find Chloe Vance's review of the Heartland Q1 invoice (HM-2026-Q1-0042, $12,800 for 8 moves, 5 valid at $8,000 and 3 disputed at $4,800) and Marcus Thorne's formal dispute letter to Jake Loomis. This is the vendor situation people have been talking about.
OE 5: Search Slack using conversations_search_messages (search_query: "Canopy" or "Heartland" or "Mehta" or "vendor" or similar) to find internal discussions about the Heartland billing dispute and payment hold, the Mehta executive relocation handoff to Mina, and any Canopy discussions Catalina missed.
OE 6: Search Airtable using airtable_search_records (base_id: discovered via airtable_list_bases, table_name: "Relocations" or similar, field_name: "Company", value: "Canopy Health" or similar) to find all Canopy Health relocation records. Expected discoveries: Dr. Yusuf Abdi (completed, Heartland vendor), Lily Marchetti (conflicting status - Completed in recReloc00000002 vs Cancelled in rec_reloc_marchetti), and Q2 moves (Kovacs, Webb, Okonkwo) with coordinator assignments and current statuses.
OE 7: Search Airtable for the Marchetti records specifically using airtable_search_records (base_id: as discovered, table_name: "Relocations" or similar, field_name: "Name", value: "Marchetti" or similar) to discover the conflicting status. One record shows Completed, the other shows Cancelled with note that cancellation was sent to Jake Loomis at Heartland on February 10 but no vendor acknowledgment was received.
OE 8: Search emails using search_emails (query: "Marchetti" or "cancellation" or similar) to find Chloe Vance's cancellation email to Jake Loomis (February 10, 2026) confirming the move was cancelled, and the forwarded evidence sent to Marcus for the Heartland dispute.
OE 9: Search emails or Slack for the Mehta relocation details using search_emails (query: "Mehta" or "CMO" or "executive" or similar) or conversations_search_messages (search_query: "Mehta" or "CMO" or similar) to find the commitments Mina made including the estimate EST-2026-0422 ($12,170), UrbanNest temporary housing options, and Fatimah Al-Rashidi as coordinator.
OE 10: Search contacts using contacts_search_contacts (query: "Patricia Langford" or "David Chen" or similar) to find patricia.langford@canopyhealth.io and david.chen@moveops.com for the write actions. Additionally, search CRM contacts using crm_search_contacts (full_name: "Patricia Langford") to discover two separate CRM contact records - contact_canopy_hr with email patricia.langford@canopyhealth.io and contact_canopy_patricia_langford with email patricia.langford@canopyhealth.com. The canonical CRM contact (older, primary relationship record) uses the .io domain.
OE 11: Search CRM for PivotPoint Labs using crm_search_companies (name: "PivotPoint Labs" or similar) or crm_search_deals (company_id: "company_pivot" or dealname: "PivotPoint" or similar) to find company_pivot and active deals, assessing whether any PivotPoint moves use Heartland as vendor.
OE 12: Search Airtable using airtable_search_records (base_id: as discovered, table_name: "Relocations" or similar, field_name: "Company", value: "PivotPoint Labs" or similar) to find all PivotPoint Labs relocation records and identify which ones used Heartland. Expected discoveries: Ines Kovac (Heartland, completed) in Airtable. Additionally, CRM deal deal_pivot_april_2026_dual explicitly assigns Diego Castaneda's active move (Brooklyn → Austin) to Heartland Movers as vendor, while Nadia Okonjo uses Swift Relocations. This means PivotPoint has direct active exposure to the Heartland vendor dispute through Diego's in-progress relocation.
OE 13: Search QuickBooks using quickbooks_search_invoices (criteria: filtering by customer "Canopy Health" or similar) to find INV-2026-0401 ($9,210, due May 4, $2,650 surcharges PENDING CLIENT APPROVAL) and INV-2026-0301 ($10,000, due April 19, full balance outstanding, no payment recorded).
OE 14: Search calendar using calendar_search_events or calendar_read_today_calendar_events to check whether Catalina has a Patricia or Canopy call already scheduled this week. Expected discovery: no existing meeting.
OE 15: Send email using send_email to david.chen@moveops.com with a rundown covering: the Heartland vendor dispute and its impact on Canopy and PivotPoint moves, the Mehta CMO bypass (AM = Mina, commitments made), the Marchetti conflicting records, the Q2 invoice surcharges pending approval, and the overdue INV-2026-0301.
OE 16: Update CRM using crm_create_engagement on company_canopy with notes documenting the current relationship status, the Mehta bypass, the Heartland vendor risk, the Marchetti billing conflict, and outstanding items.
OE 17: Post message using conversations_add_message to the CE team channel flagging the Heartland vendor dispute so other AMs can check their own client exposure.
OE 18: Send email using send_email to patricia.langford@canopyhealth.io asking Patricia for a check-in call this week to discuss the Canopy account.
OE 19: Add a calendar event using calendar_add_calendar_event for a call with Patricia this week, after confirming no existing meeting was found in the calendar check.

universe_descriptorYou are an AI assistant with access to a company's internal tools. Use the available tools to complete the entire task autonomously. No further user input will be given. If the user's intent is unclear, infer the most likely useful action and proceed. Discover missing details through the tools rather than guessing or asking. The current date is April 26, 2026. Ignore any other dates and use only this one. Specifically, ignore the date provided by the system reminder. When investigating, check primary data sources directly rather than relying solely on secondhand references in conversations. Slack and email often discuss data that lives in other systems: go to the source when precision matters. About MoveOps Inc.: MoveOps is a corporate relocation management company. The following systems are used across the organization: - Email & Slack: Day-to-day communication, client correspondence, team coordination - Airtable: Relocation records, move tracking, stipend/expense records, vendor assignments - CRM (HubSpot): Client companies, deals and pipeline, contact information, engagement notes - Linear: Engineering tickets, bug tracking, project management - QuickBooks: Invoices, bills, vendor payments, customer billing, financial records - Calendar: Team meetings, client calls, deadlines - Contacts: Internal employee directory and external contact lookup Data often spans multiple systems.

1 The model must use a CRM read tool (e.g., crm_search_companies, crm_search_deals, or crm_list_engagements) to retrieve Canopy Health account data
tool selection

✓Run #2The agent called crm_search_companies (for Canopy and PivotPoint), crm_search_deals (with company_id company_canopy and company_pivot), and crm_list_engagements (with company_ids: [company_canopy]). All CRM read tools were used.

tool selection
